title: Pung v. Isabella County
description: The panel deliberates Pung v. Isabella County. Verdict: reverse 5-4. The real Court: reverse 9-0. Every clip is verbatim from the deliberation record.

title: Suncor Energy v. Boulder County

title: Younge v. Fulton Judicial Circuit District Attorney's Office
description: Prediction on the record: REVERSE 8-1 — with an on-tape flip, as the Pragmatist crosses from affirm to reverse in round one. Cert granted for OT2026, not yet argued; the panel will be graded in public. Every clip is verbatim from the deliberation record.
